creator: juho.hiltunen@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 159034
Patch for updating devel/ninja to 1.6.0

Attached patch updates devel/ninja from 1.5.3 to 1.6.0. 
The patch does the following:
* bump the version number in Makefile
* change the checksum in distinfo
* remove files/patch-configure.py. The port builds with python27 and python34 without this patch. I don't know why it was needed originally. If it's needed I'll put it back
